commands.review_summary:
The PR changes embedded agent model resolution to try the selected OpenAI/Codex runtime provider before the logical config provider, updates mocks, and adds e2e coverage for transport-owned Codex runs.

PR surface: Source +40, Tests +82. Total +122 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only tries the selected runtime provider after the logical provider returns a model, so a runtime-provider-only dynamic model cannot be reached. I did not run the failing live path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated; maintainers need to decide whether the provider-routing risk and current proof are sufficient to land.

target.title: fix(agents): resolve Codex runtime models first
target.body:
## Summary
- Resolve OpenAI Codex runtime models against the selected runtime provider before the logical config provider.
- Preserve the existing dynamic-model fast path and generated models.json fallback for OpenClaw-owned transport.
- Add e2e coverage for transport-owned Codex runs where logical openai/gpt-5.5 is backed by openai-codex/gpt-5.5.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.e2e.test.ts
- pnpm exec oxlint src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.e2e.test.ts src/agents/test-helpers/embedded-agent-runner-e2e-mocks.ts
- git diff --check
- pnpm check:changed via Blacksmith Testbox tbx_01ksnkpwx20w431kjt0jad0prj
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: OpenAI model refs selected for the Codex runtime no longer fail model resolution before the openai-codex runtime provider is tried.
Real environment tested: Local focused Vitest plus Blacksmith Testbox changed-check.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.e2e.test.ts; pnpm check:changed.
Evidence after fix: Focused e2e passed 13 tests; Testbox run tbx_01ksnkpwx20w431kjt0jad0prj exited 0.
Observed result after fix: Runtime-provider-first resolution selects openai-codex for Codex-owned OpenAI runs and skips models.json generation when the runtime provider resolves dynamically.
What was not tested: Live provider call with real OpenAI/Codex credentials.
target.author: steipete
